action.reasoning: Observation: 3 consecutive OOM crashes with 3D data + SchNet. Analysis: Loading 104K molecules as raw dicts + converting to PyG Data objects exceeds 48GB RAM. Decision: Take a two-pronged approach: (1) Quick baseline with SMILES + mordred descriptors + XGBoost, (2) Then fix 3D approach with pre-processing to disk. Start with approach 1 for immediate baseline.
